text.title: Experiment Verdict Template Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to close an experiment via the verdict ritual.

step.name: pre-close-check
step.action: If current date > pre-reg close_date + 5 business days, auto-stop variant assignment.
step.decision-gate: If team wants to extend, demand new pre-registration with power re-justification.

step.name: write-verdict
step.action: Compute primary lift + CI + p-value. Pull each pre-registered secondary metric. Pick verdict from the 5-enum via decision tree.

step.name: secondary-review
step.action: If verdict=ship-treatment AND any secondary shows regression, require exec_sign_off OR downgrade to inconclusive-iterate.
step.decision-gate: If exec_sign_off empty and regression present, do not close.

step.name: capture-learning
step.action: Write learning.claim ≥ 20 chars with confidence tag. Push to learnings database.

step.name: route-action
step.action: Set routed.owner + target_date. Create ticket. Verdict moves to closed_at = now.
